stories.headline: Venezuela’s Maduro set to appear in US court months after abduction
stories.description: The Venezuelan leader, who is accused of plotting to traffic cocaine, denies all charges as part of an imperialist plot.

stories.headline: ‘He will call me Mama’: The Gaza ‘grandmother’ raising an orphaned baby
stories.description: Maha was ‘Grandmother’ in her family until she adopted Hamza, born the day an Israeli air strike killed his parents.

stories.headline: Smoking ban in Scotland's pubs was a 'PR war'
stories.description: Exactly 20 years ago, Scotland became the first part of the UK to outlaw smoking in bars, restaurants and offices.

stories.headline: Helium hitch: Why US-Israel war on Iran could cause MRI scan delays
stories.description: Shortage of helium will have ripple effects across medical and other industries.

stories.headline: Two teenagers killed in Shiraz, two dead in Abu Dhabi as Iran war expands
stories.description: Deadly attacks rise as Israel announces strikes on Isfahan and as Trump and Tehran debate ceasefire terms.
